title: TopBuild Corp (BLD) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Key Financial Results: Revenue & Growth: Q3 2024 revenue reached $1.37 billion, representing a 3.6% increase year-over-year. Installation sales grew 4.2% to $856.4 million. Specialty distribution sales rose 5.1% to $600.4 million. Profitability Metrics: Adjusted EBITDA totaled $285.1 million with a 20.8% margin. Adjusted gross profit margin stood at 30.7% ($421.8 million). Adjusted earnings per diluted share increased 4.6% compared to the prior year. Operating Efficiency: Adjusted SG&A expenses represented 12.8% of sales, improving by 40 basis points. Balance Sheet & Cash Flow: Total liquidity: $693.6 million. Net debt: $1.14 billion (1.06x leverage ratio). Trailing twelve-month free cash flow: $698 million (2.6% improvement). Share repurchases: $413.9 million (1.07 million shares). 2024 Full-Year Guidance: Sales guidance: $5.3 to $5.35 billion. Adjusted EBITDA guidance: $1.055 to $1.085 billion. The company achieved record high sales while executing strategic M&A activities with seven acquisitions contributing approximately $118 million in annual revenue.
